name: azure
description: Azure cloud infrastructure management via the Azure CLI (az). Ask Claude to run any az command — VMs, AKS, Storage, Resource Groups, App Service, Functions, and more.

tools.name: az
tools.description:
Run any Azure CLI command. Pass all arguments after 'az' as an array.

Examples:
- List VMs: ["vm", "list", "--output", "table"]
- List resource groups: ["group", "list", "--output", "table"]
- AKS clusters: ["aks", "list", "--output", "json"]
- Storage accounts: ["storage", "account", "list"]
- App services: ["webapp", "list", "--resource-group", "myRG"]
- Get VM status: ["vm", "show", "-g", "myRG", "-n", "myVM", "--show-details"]
